\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}

class \mbox{\hyperlink{classTriangle}{Triangle}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Triangular surface element with cached geometry and utilities. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Declaration of the \doxylink{classTriangle}{Triangle} class (surface element with cached geometry). 

The \doxylink{classTriangle}{Triangle} class stores pointers to its three corner nodes and the two bordering domain indices (front/back). It caches geometric quantities (reference normal, area, perimeter, center of gravity) and provides analytic self-\/integrals. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{Triangle_8h_source}{Triangle.\+h}}.
